news_headlines.title: Halliburton’s Guyana Automation Milestone Puts Digital Well Strategy In Focus
news_headlines.summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) completed what it describes as the industry's first fully automated geological well placement offshore in Guyana. The project used integrated rig automation and real time data workflows to steer the well without manual geological intervention. The new process led to meaningful efficiency gains and sets a template for future automated well construction projects. For investors following oilfield services, this move highlights how Halliburton is emphasizing software,...
